name: crm-orchestrator
description: Central coordinator for all CRM agentic workflows. Routes tasks to specialized sub-agents and manages multi-turn conversation flow.

skills.name: Route Task
skills.description: Analyze and route a user intent to appropriate specialized agent(s)

skills.name: Sequential Workflow
skills.description: Execute a sequence of agent tasks in order, passing outputs as inputs

skills.name: Parallel Workflow
skills.description: Dispatch multiple agent tasks simultaneously and aggregate results
